extraction.one_line_summary: SCHACHMANN won from a late 4-rider split after BENOОТ and ALAPHILIPPE animated on the penultimate climb with 28km remaining.
tactical_patterns: BENOОТ initiated decisive split with ALAPHILIPPE on final climb at 28km, establishing winning group before sprint finish.
TEUNS chased solo from peloton to bridge to lead group, demonstrating climbing domestique can contest finale in scattered conditions.
Trek-Segafredo lost race leader PORTE in early echelon split, exposing team's deficit in wind positioning despite stage race ambitions.

rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: outsprinted ALAPHILIPPE from 4-rider finale despite sitting on through decisive climb, indicating exceptional positioning discipline
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: animated race on final climb but lost sprint, suggesting early-season form insufficient for usual explosive finishing power
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: initiated winning split on final climb 28km out, demonstrating classics-style aggression translates to hilly stage racing
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: bridged solo from peloton to lead group after missing initial split, showing climbing strength beyond pure domestique role
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: negative: abandoned after crash at 100km mark despite attempting to continue, raising durability concerns for stage race objectives
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: caught out in early echelon split, confirming vulnerability to crosswind positioning despite two prior race victories
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: neutral: attacked from peloton on penultimate climb but absorbed into lead group without dictating pace
